summary: What happens when someone who has spent 30+ years building India's mutual fund industry shares his personal investing playbook? In this episode of This or That with Bhartendra, Bhalchandra Joshi, COO of The Wealth Company, shares hard-earned lessons from investing through multiple market crashes, bull markets, and investor cycles.

chapters.label: Years of Investing: What Actually Creates Wealth?
How He Invests His Own Money
The Best Investment You Can Make
How Many Mutual Funds Are Enough?
What To Do In Today's Market

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: This episode is really about your mix. Put in your numbers and see the equity, debt, gold and international split that actually fits you.

disclaimer: For education only. Nothing here is financial, investment, or legal advice. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Please consult a SEBI-registered investment adviser before making any decision.
